creator: david.marec@proton.me
text:
Created attachment 225292
BROKEN_SLL if running FreeBSD 11 and base openssl

Make port BROKEN for users running FreeBSD lower than 1200085 with openssl libraries only available from base. 
(openssl <1.1.1, rev 339270 & 339732)

Port built sucessfully with `DEFAULT_VERSIONS+=ssl=openssl`
